# Pull Request

## 📋 Description
Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## 🔄 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration/script improvement
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting change
- [ ] 🏗️ Repository organization

## 📁 Areas Affected
- [ ] Main documentation (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)
- [ ] Blog content
- [ ] Image assets
- [ ] Configuration files
- [ ] CachyOS resources
- [ ] Other: ____________

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the repository's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## 🧪 Testing
Describe the tests you performed to verify your changes:
- [ ] Tested locally on: ____________
- [ ] Verified links work correctly
- [ ] Checked formatting renders properly
- [ ] Tested scripts/configurations (if applicable)

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## 🔗 Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)
Relates to #(issue number)

## 📝 Additional Notes
Any additional information that reviewers should know about this PR.
